title: Moderation Update – April 29, 2026
body: Queue triaged (6 reports). Actions taken: BANNED spam_wave_42 (phishing links in multiple channels). BANNED toxic_runner (repeated targeted harassment). WARNED bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automated replies). No action on reports involving trusted_helper (dispute, no violation) and core_maintainer (confirmed false positive). Low-severity formatting report noted, no action needed.
